UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents the administrator's profile information, excluding authentication credentials, for system access and personalization.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity. This typically corresponds to the Firebase Authentication UID.

email.description: The email address associated with the user profile, used for display and communication, not for authentication.

name.description: The full name of the administrator.

businessName.description: The name of the user's business.

businessDocument.description: CNPJ or CPF of the business.

role.description: The role of the user within the application, e.g., 'admin'.

primaryColor.description: Hex code for the primary theme color.

backgroundColor.description: Hex code for the application background color.

customAppLogoUrl.description: URL or Data URI for the application logo.

loginPageLogoUrl.description: URL or Data URI for the login page logo.

customWelcomeBgUrl.description: URL or Data URI for the welcome page background image.

welcomeTitle.description: Title displayed on the welcome page.

welcomeSubtitle.description: Subtitle displayed on the welcome page.

welcomeButtonText.description: Text for the action button on the welcome page.

welcomeFooterText.description: Text displayed in the footer of the welcome page.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was last updated.

Client.title: Client
Client.description: Stores information about individual customers with whom services are provided.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Client entity.

name.description: The full name or business name of the client.

phone.description: The primary contact phone number for the client.

whatsapp.description: The WhatsApp contact number for the client, if different from the primary phone.

address.description: The physical address of the client.

documentNumber.description: The CPF (for individuals) or CNPJ (for businesses) document number of the client.

observations.description: General observations or notes about the client.

totalSpent.description: The total monetary value of services purchased by this client. This is typically a derived value for quick access.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the client record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the client record was last updated.

Invoice.title: Invoice
Invoice.description: Represents an invoice or professional receipt for tax and billing purposes.

Supplier.title: Supplier
Supplier.description: Holds details about suppliers from whom materials or services are acquired.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Supplier entity.

name.description: The name of the supplier or supplier company.

phone.description: The primary contact phone number for the supplier.

category.description: The category of goods or services provided by the supplier (e.g., 'Eletrônicos', 'Ferragens').

observations.description: General observations or notes about the supplier.

totalPurchased.description: The total monetary value of goods or services purchased from this supplier. This is typically a derived value for quick access.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the supplier record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the supplier record was last updated.

ServiceType.title: ServiceType
ServiceType.description: Defines the different types of services offered by the business.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ServiceType entity.

name.description: The name of the service type (e.g., 'Montagem de Móveis', 'Instalação de Ar-condicionado').

description.description: A detailed description of the service type.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the service type was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the service type was last updated.

Service.title: Service
Service.description: Represents a single service instance performed for a client, including its details and status.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Service entity.

clientId.description: Reference to the Client for whom the service was performed. (Relationship: Client 1:N Service)

serviceTypeId.description: Reference to the ServiceType that describes this service. (Relationship: ServiceType 1:N Service)

scheduledDate.description: The date and time when the service is scheduled to occur.

completedDate.description: The date and time when the service was completed.

status.description: The current status of the service (e.g., 'Orçamento', 'Em andamento', 'Concluído', 'Cancelado').

chargedValue.description: The monetary value charged for this service.

materialsUsedIds.description: References to Products (materials) used in this service. (Relationship: Product N:N Service)

detailedDescription.description: A detailed description of the work performed for the service.

attachedPhotoUris.description: URIs of photos attached to document the service (e.g., before/after pictures).

observations.description: General observations or notes related to the service.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the service record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the service record was last updated.

MaterialCategory.title: MaterialCategory
MaterialCategory.description: Categorizes materials used in stock for better organization and management.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MaterialCategory entity.

name.description: The name of the material category (e.g., 'Elétrica', 'Parafusos e Fixadores').

description.description: A detailed description of the material category.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the material category was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the material category was last updated.

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents an individual item or material held in inventory.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Product entity.

name.description: The name of the material or product.

materialCategoryId.description: Reference to the MaterialCategory this product belongs to. (Relationship: MaterialCategory 1:N Product)

internalCode.description: An internal code or SKU for the product, for inventory tracking.

currentQuantity.description: The current quantity of the product in stock.

minimumQuantity.description: The minimum quantity threshold for this product, triggering low stock alerts.

unitCost.description: The cost of a single unit of the product.

supplierId.description: Reference to the Supplier from whom this product is typically acquired. (Relationship: Supplier 1:N Product)

entryDate.description: The date when this product was first entered into stock.

storageLocation.description: The physical location where the product is stored (e.g., 'Prateleira A', 'Armário 3').

observations.description: General observations or notes about the product.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the product record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the product record was last updated.

FinancialEntry.title: FinancialEntry
FinancialEntry.description: Records all incoming financial transactions or revenues.

id.description: Unique identifier for the FinancialEntry entity.

date.description: The date when the financial entry occurred.

clientId.description: Reference to the Client associated with this revenue, if applicable. (Relationship: Client 1:N FinancialEntry)

serviceTypeId.description: Reference to the ServiceType that generated this revenue, if applicable. (Relationship: ServiceType 1:N FinancialEntry)

value.description: The monetary value of the financial entry.

paymentMethodId.description: Reference to the PaymentMethod used for this entry. (Relationship: PaymentMethod 1:N FinancialEntry)

status.description: The payment status of the entry (e.g., 'Pago', 'Pendente').

observations.description: General observations or notes about the financial entry.

serviceId.description: Optional reference to the Service that generated this financial entry. (Relationship: Service 1:N FinancialEntry)

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the financial entry record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the financial entry record was last updated.

ExpenseCategory.title: ExpenseCategory
ExpenseCategory.description: Defines categories for financial expenditures to enable detailed expense tracking.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ExpenseCategory entity.

name.description: The name of the expense category (e.g., 'Material', 'Combustível', 'Ferramenta', 'Marketing', 'Outros').

description.description: A detailed description of what the expense category includes.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the expense category was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the expense category was last updated.

FinancialExit.title: FinancialExit
FinancialExit.description: Records all outgoing financial transactions or expenses.

id.description: Unique identifier for the FinancialExit entity.

date.description: The date when the financial exit occurred.

expenseCategoryId.description: Reference to the ExpenseCategory this financial exit belongs to. (Relationship: ExpenseCategory 1:N FinancialExit)

value.description: The monetary value of the financial exit.

paymentMethodId.description: Reference to the PaymentMethod used for this exit. (Relationship: PaymentMethod 1:N FinancialExit)

supplierId.description: Optional reference to the Supplier associated with this expense. (Relationship: Supplier 1:N FinancialExit)

observations.description: General observations or notes about the financial exit.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the financial exit record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the financial exit record was last updated.

StockMovement.title: StockMovement
StockMovement.description: Logs all movements of products in and out of stock, including adjustments.

id.description: Unique identifier for the StockMovement entity.

productId.description: Reference to the Product that was moved. (Relationship: Product 1:N StockMovement)

type.description: The type of movement (e.g., 'entrada' for incoming, 'saida' for outgoing, 'ajuste' for inventory correction).

quantity.description: The quantity of the product moved. Positive for incoming, negative for outgoing.

movementDate.description: The date and time when the stock movement occurred.

reason.description: The reason for the stock movement (e.g., 'compra', 'venda', 'uso em serviço', 'inventário').

serviceId.description: Optional reference to a Service if the movement is related to materials used in a service. (Relationship: Service 1:N StockMovement)

observations.description: General observations or notes about the stock movement.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the stock movement record was created.

PaymentMethod.title: PaymentMethod
PaymentMethod.description: Defines the various methods of payment accepted or used for transactions.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PaymentMethod entity.

name.description: The name of the payment method (e.g., 'Dinheiro', 'Cartão de Crédito', 'Pix', 'Transferência Bancária').

description.description: A brief description of the payment method.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the payment method was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the payment method was last updated.

definition.description: Stores profile information for users, primarily the administrator.

params.name: userId
params.description: The Firebase Authentication UID of the user.

definition.description: Defines the various types of services offered.

params.name: serviceTypeId
params.description: Unique identifier for the service type.

params.name: materialCategoryId
params.description: Unique identifier for the material category.

params.name: expenseCategoryId
params.description: Unique identifier for the expense category.

definition.description: Represents an individual item in inventory.

params.name: paymentMethodId
params.description: Unique identifier for the payment method.
